DP.244.0000:
[0103,0000]: Darn it!
What was that all about?!\f
Oh, hey, [0103,0001].
That Buck guy wiped us!\f
Oh, man... There’s always tough
Trainers around everywhere.\f
But you know? Losing means I have
room to become even tougher.\f
That’s why there’s the Battle Tower
in the Battle Zone.
DP.244.0001:
[0103,0000]: Darn it!
I’m still choked up from losing.\f
But you know? Losing means I have
room to become even tougher.\f
That’s why there’s the Battle Tower
in the Battle Zone.
DP.244.0002:
[0103,0000]: Hey, [0103,0001]!
Are you still raising your Pokémon?\f
Me? You need to ask? Of course I am.
They’re my partners!\f
I’m going to rule at the Battle Tower
with them.\f
I’ll prove how strong we’ve become
and totally shock the guy there.
